title: Vertigoes
description: Small mod adding a collection of seemingly random things
body:
Vertigoes is a small Forge Minecraft mod that aims to.. oh well, I'm just adding ~~neat~~ random things; and maybe you'd like some of them!

Stuff added and descriptions are here: [vertigoes.damocles.dev](https://vertigoes.damocles.dev/)

But I recommend using JEI to see in-game descriptions.
